title: knema latericia subsp. ridleyi
intro: Knema latericia subsp. ridleyi is a sub-species of the Knema latericia plant, which is a species of evergreen tree native to Malaysia and Indonesia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The seeds of Knema latericia subsp. ridleyi contain compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and cancer, while also providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the seeds are often prepared by drying and then grinding them into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules.
